articles.title: Crowd swell at CJP protest site ahead of Parliament march
articles.description: Crowds continued to pour into the CJP's protest site at Jantar Mantar through the day as preparations gathered pace for Monday's march to Parliament

articles.title: India advises citizens to postpone travel to Iran amid rising instability
articles.description: It advised Indians already in Iran to consider temporarily exiting the country using available flight options

articles.title: ‘There was no need for Govt. intervention’: Wangchuk’s wife Gitanjali on Delhi HC refusing interim relief on hospital transfer
articles.description: Gitanjali Angmo said the PIL was “wrongly interpreted” and that they will file another petition on July 20

articles.title: CJP Parliament March 2026 LIVE: Wangchuk ready to end fast on 3 conditions; heavy security at Jantar Mantar
articles.description: CJP Parliament March 2026 LIVE: The CJP march, proposed on the first day of the Monsoon Session of the Parliament, has not yet received the go-ahead by the Delhi Police, which has imposed prohibitory orders across much of the New Delhi.

articles.title: 'Will end fast if...': Sonam Wangchuk announces big terms ahead of CJP Parliament march today
articles.description: Sonam Wangchuk, in a note, alleged he was "illegally detained" in Safdarjung Hospital, with his freedom of movement, speech, communication "restricted."

articles.title: Thousands gather at Jantar Mantar ahead of CJP’s march to Parliament
articles.description: The Cockroach Janta Party’s designated protest site overflowed with unprecedented crowds following activist Sonam Wangchuk’s forced hospitalisation

articles.title: Security up in Delhi ahead of Parliament session, CJP rally
articles.description: Prohibitory orders in place till August 22; police say CJP has not sought permission for march

articles.title: Srinagar’s Vichar Nag temple sees puja again, L-G says ‘revival serves as a historic bridge’
articles.description: Scores of Kashmiri Pandits attended the ceremony in an area that once hosted a number of Pandit families who had to leave their homeland due to militancy in the 1990s

articles.title: U.K.'s Burnham drops digital ID scheme to prioritise cost of living, say allies
articles.description: Dubbed the ‘King of the North’ for his work as the mayor of Greater Manchester in northwestern England, Burnham will replace Keir Starmer ‌as Prime Minister on July 20, when he says he will also unveil his cabinet team of top Ministers

articles.title: CJP protest in Delhi LIVE: Will end fasting today if government takes accountability for failures in education system, says Sonam Wangchuk
articles.description: The CJP’s 1.5-kilometre march is planned to start from the Jantar Mantar protest site, before moving through the Patel Chowk roundabout and terminating at the new Parliament building

articles.title: Government to move Bill in Rajya Sabha today to make insult to Vande Mataram a criminal offence
articles.description: 1971 legislation to be amended; Lok Sabha to take up Bill to increase number of Supreme Court judges

articles.title: Bihar CM opens ₹130.88-cr. link to divert floodwaters, enhance farm productivity
articles.description: The link, part of a river interlinking project, will reduce intensity of floods in northern Bihar, says Choudhary; he also inaugurates 551 schools, lists measures to improve education infrastructure

articles.title: At least eight dead, 15 hurt in Nagaland landslide
articles.description: Heavy incessant rainfall and a cloudburst caused widespread destruction at various locations in and around Mon town; State announces ex-gratia of ₹4 lakh for kin of deceased, ₹74,000 for each of the injured

articles.title: Students must unite against drugs: Minister Bindu Krishna
articles.description: She was presiding over the distribution ceremony of the ‘Focus Kollam’ Minister’s Excellence Award-2026, organised for talented students from the Kollam constituency

articles.title: Villagers oppose new stone quarry, crusher unit near Cheyyar in Tiruvannamalai
articles.description: The quarry might pollute groundwater and waterbodies, and affect agricultural activities, say residents

articles.title: Panel to consider two complaints on leasing and illegal diversion of forest land in Kerala
articles.description: The complaints on reported illegal diversion of forest land and irregular timber auction in Chalakudy forest division and the alleged continued use of reserved forest land by Plantation Corporation of Kerala will come up before the Central Empowered Committee, New Delhi, on July 20
